# Bevel measurement config
# Lines starting with # are comments and will be ignored.
# Keep every config item on its own line.
# Units must match scan cloud and template cloud, normally mm.


# -------------------------
# 1. Preprocess: uniform voxel downsample
# -------------------------
# Enable uniform voxel downsample: true or false.
preprocess.uniform.enable = true

# Voxel leaf size. Smaller value keeps more detail and reduces holes.
preprocess.uniform.leaf_size = 1.5


# -------------------------
# 2. Preprocess: pose correction
# -------------------------
# Enable pose correction from camera coordinate to measurement coordinate.
preprocess.pose.enable = true

# Translation: tx ty tz.
preprocess.pose.translation = 0 0 0

# Rotation angle: rx ry rz, unit is degree. Internal order is Rz * Ry * Rx.
preprocess.pose.rotation_deg = 0 0 0


# -------------------------
# 3. Preprocess: crop box
# -------------------------
# Enable crop box to keep bevel area and remove background points.
preprocess.crop.enable = true

# Crop min point: x_min y_min z_min.
preprocess.crop.min = -78 -182 43

# Crop max point: x_max y_max z_max.
preprocess.crop.max = 71 217 443


# -------------------------
# 4. Preprocess: isolated point filter
# -------------------------
# Enable statistical outlier removal.
preprocess.outlier.enable = true

# Neighbor count used by statistical filter.
preprocess.outlier.mean_k = 10

# Stddev multiplier. Smaller value means stricter filtering. иЇҐеЂје¤§дёЂз‚№ж»¤й™¤ејєеє¦е°ЏдёЂз‚?preprocess.outlier.stddev_mul = 3.0


# -------------------------
# 5. Section projection image for SVM
# -------------------------
# SVM input image width. The current model uses 512.
section.image_width = 512

# SVM input image height. The current model uses 512.
section.image_height = 512

# Section plane center: cx cy cz.
section.center = -53.839333 6.381310 364.598816

# Section plane normal: nx ny nz. It will be normalized by program.
section.normal = 0.919991 0.381857 0.088330

# Slice thickness. Point is used when distance to plane is within half thickness.
section.thickness = 3.0

# Projection scale. 0 means auto scale.
section.scale = 0

# Save projected image for debug.
section.save_image = true

# Projected image output path.
section.image_path = data/debug/projection.png

# Save PCA normalized image used by SVM.
section.save_normalized_image = true

# PCA normalized image output path.
section.normalized_image_path = data/debug/projection_pca.png


# -------------------------
# 6. SVM model
# -------------------------
# OpenCV SVM weight file path.
# Tip: Chinese path can fail in some narrow-character APIs.
# If loading fails, copy svm_weight.xml to data/svm_weight.xml and use that relative path.
svm.model_path = data/svm_weight.xml


# -------------------------
# 7. Template cloud and feature points
# -------------------------
# {type} will be replaced by SVM result, for example type_0.pcd.
# If main.cpp passes templateDir, templateDir has higher priority.
template.path_pattern = data/templates/type_{type}_template.pcd

# Measurement method: plane_fit or direct_points.БЅЦЦЅвЛгЖВїЪЅЗ¶ИєН¶Ы±Яі¤¶И·Ѕ·Ё
measurement.method = plane_fit

# Plane-fit method feature path. Needs plane1_p1..plane1_p6, plane2_p1..plane2_p6, project_normal, project_point, length_a, length_b.
template.plane_fit_feature_path_pattern = data/templates/type_{type}_features_plane_fit.txt

# Direct point method feature path. Needs angle_a, angle_b, angle_c, length_a, length_b.
template.direct_feature_path_pattern = data/templates/type_{type}_features_direct.txt


# -------------------------
# 8. ICP params
# -------------------------
# Max ICP iterations.
icp.max_iterations = 300

# Max correspondence distance between scan point and template point.
icp.max_correspondence_distance = 200.0

# Transformation convergence threshold.
icp.transformation_epsilon = 1e-8

# з›ёй‚»дё¤ж¬ЎеЊ№й…ЌиЇЇе·®зљ„е·®еј‚Euclidean fitness convergence threshold.
icp.euclidean_fitness_epsilon = 1e-3

# Enable trimmed ICP correspondence rejection.
# It sorts correspondences by nearest-point distance and keeps only the best ratio.
icp.trim.enable = true

# Keep the nearest N percent correspondences. 0.7 means keeping best 70 percent.
icp.trim.overlap_ratio = 0.98

# Minimum correspondence count kept by trimmed ICP.
icp.trim.min_correspondences = 50

# Save scan cloud after ICP transform. It is saved even if ICP does not converge.
icp.save_aligned_cloud = true

# Output path of aligned scan cloud.
icp.aligned_cloud_path = data/debug/aligned_scan.pcd


# -------------------------
# 9. Quality standard
# -------------------------
# If angle and length are both qualified, quality_code outputs 0.
# If angle or length is unqualified, quality_code outputs 10000.

# Min bevel angle, degree.
standard.angle_min_deg = 43.0

# Max bevel angle, degree.
standard.angle_max_deg = 47.0

# Min bevel length, same unit as cloud.
standard.length_min = 5.0

# Max bevel length, same unit as cloud.
standard.length_max = 7.0
